nodes.context: Criminal gang in Pigalle, Paris, composed of former Carlingue militia, police, and Resistance members.
French militia that collaborated with German occupiers; some members later joined the Gang des Tractions Avant.
Earlier criminal gang whose methods were largely derived by the Gang des Tractions Avant.
Another gang that continued the methods of the Gang des Tractions Avant.

edges.evidence_quote: made up of surviving members of the Carlingue militia
edges.context: The Gang des Tractions Avant was composed of former members of the Carlingue militia.

edges.evidence_quote: Its methods were largely derived from those of the Bonnot Gang
edges.context: The Gang des Tractions Avant derived its methods from the Bonnot Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: were mostly continued by a number of other gangs, notably the gang des postiches
edges.context: The methods of the Gang des Tractions Avant were continued by the Gang des Postiches.
